summary: Completed frontend testing of Uniclass app. Authentication setup requires Supabase email confirmation to be disabled for testing. UI/UX components working well with proper responsive design and accessibility.

authentication_issues.issue: Login fails with 400 error - email verification required but not configured for testing
authentication_issues.details: Supabase requires email confirmation for login. Users can signup successfully but cannot login without email verification

design_issues.issue: Inter font family not being applied correctly
design_issues.details: Font family detection shows 'none' instead of 'Inter, sans-serif'

passed_tests: User registration (signup) working correctly with success message
Route protection functioning - unauthenticated users redirected to /auth
Form validation working for empty and invalid inputs
Responsive design working on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
Form accessibility - proper labels and required attributes
Toast notification system working for signup success
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL SETUP REQUIRED: Disable email confirmation in Supabase dashboard (Authentication > Providers > Email > Toggle OFF 'Confirm email') to enable login testing. Without this, users can register but cannot login, blocking all dashboard functionality testing.
